_notes: T-side smoke set covering the full Esports Rambles Mirage guide (§6.1 primary reference). Images under img/mirage/ are the user's own compiled clippings of that guide — fine for personal use, do NOT redistribute the app with them bundled. Every entry stays verified:false until it is re-tested in the current build; replace images with your own captures (and record cl_showpos coords into `spot`) during that pass. See img/mirage/README.md.

stand.text: At T spawn, tuck into the wall corner on the A side and line up flush with it.

aim.text: Put the crosshair on the roof edge directly above the dark stain on the wall.

stand.text: Hop onto the first step of the platform outside T ramp and line up with the platform edge.

aim.text: Aim at the middle of the gap between the building and the wooden pillar — the window on the left is a useful reference. Needs to be fairly precise.

stand.text: Take the position shown in the screenshot.

aim.text: Match the crosshair placement shown, then jumpthrow. The smoke flies long — it takes a moment before it lands on stairs.

stand.text: Take the position shown in the screenshot.

aim.text: Match the crosshair placement shown and throw. This one blooms wide — players can hide inside or under it at sandwich.

stand.text: Stand up on the short railing beside the metal fence, centered on the fence.

aim.text: Aim toward the right side of the small wooden ledge in the corner — it's forgiving, anywhere around the gap between the wood and the wall works.

lineups.name: Ticket box (alternate)
lineups.target: A site — Top of ticket box

stand.text: Center yourself on the wall in the corner.

aim.text: Match the crosshair placement shown, then jumpthrow. Lands on top of the ticket box and blocks more of the vision behind the booth.

stand.text: Go up the platform from T spawn to the first window near ramp (check no CTs are pushing).

aim.text: Line yourself up on the dark spot, turn 180°, then aim at the top-right of the small block and throw.

stand.text: On the platform, stand midway between the two windows.

aim.text: Aim just left of the pillar, below its top — there's a generous margin, it lands in roughly the same place.

stand.text: At T spawn, stand in front of the trash can hugging the wall on your right.

aim.text: Aim at the top-right corner of the railing, then hold strafe-right (D) through the jumpthrow. Practice the strafe timing a few times.

stand.text: Stand in front of the trash can at T spawn.

aim.text: Aim by the white border of the wall, lined up with the dark spot — then strafe right into the jumpthrow.

stand.text: Center yourself on the first wooden scaffolding pillar, crosshair on the middle of the pillar.

aim.text: Aim at the bottom-right section of the hanging wires near the wall corner. Slower to set up — call it with your team. Recent updates shifted this lineup slightly right; re-verify before trusting it.

stand.text: Jump on top of the trash can in T spawn.

aim.text: Aim at the top-right part of the antenna and throw. Quick to do off spawn — tell teammates to cross once it blooms.

stand.text: Take the position shown in the screenshot.

aim.text: Match the crosshair placement shown, then jumpthrow. Covers the push up short on a mid-to-A or A split without getting shot from catwalk.

stand.text: Stand in the corner shown in the screenshot.

aim.text: Aim at the center of the white line on the rug, then jumpthrow. Can leave a small gap at points during its duration — see the alternate connector smoke for full cover.

stand.text: Take the position shown in the screenshot.

aim.text: Match the crosshair placement shown, then jumpthrow. Blocks connector fully, with no gaps.

stand.text: Take the position shown in the screenshot.

aim.text: Match the crosshair placement shown, then jumpthrow. Blocks the AWP angle from market window onto B apps.

stand.text: Stand by the corner shown — same position as the market window smoke.

aim.text: Match the crosshair placement shown, then jumpthrow. Shuts the market door to slow rotators onto site.

stand.text: Walk up to the pillar shown in the screenshot.

aim.text: Aim at the marked ridge, keeping some space between your crosshair and the tower so the smoke doesn't bounce off it. Blocks bench/jail vision for a B rush or site entry.

stand.text: Stand in the corner, on top of the bags.

aim.text: Match the crosshair placement shown and throw. Blocks the bench and site view of short arch for a B split.
